$description: Component tokens for Inline Text Container component with multiple states (Placeholder, Hover, Active, Filled, Disabled), sizes (3xs, 2xs, xs, sm, md), validation states (Error, Warning), and content types (String Default, String Phone Number, Badge). Figma Reference: Node ID 27377-709

$component.name: Inline Text Container
$component.description: An inline text input container component that displays text content with optional leading icons, action icons, and trailing icons. Features a bottom border design with hover states that reveal action icons. Supports validation states (error, warning) and multiple content types including string inputs and badge displays.
$component.structure: Container with bottom border, optional leading icon, flexible text content area, optional action icons (visible on hover), and trailing icon (chevron or other indicator). Background changes on hover to reveal action icons.

sizes.3xs: 20px height - Minimal size for very compact inline layouts
sizes.2xs: 22px height - Extra small for dense inline forms
sizes.xs: 26px height - Small size for compact inline interfaces
sizes.sm: 28px height - Standard small size for most inline inputs
sizes.md: 36px height - Medium size for prominent inline text containers

variants.default: Standard inline text container with neutral colors for normal text display
variants.error: Error state with red/error colors for validation feedback
variants.warning: Warning state with yellow/warning colors for validation feedback

usage.contexts: Inline forms, editable text fields, data entry interfaces, table cells, list items with editable content, settings panels
usage.features: Leading icon support, multiple action icons (visible on hover), trailing indicator icon, bottom border design, hover state reveals actions, validation states, disabled state

border.$comment: Border styling for inline text container - uses bottom border only

radius.$comment: Border radius applied on hover state

hover.description: Inline text container border radius on hover - 4px

height.$comment: Container heights for each size variant

3xs.description: Inline text container height for 3xs size - 20px

2xs.description: Inline text container height for 2xs size - 22px

xs.description: Inline text container height for xs size - 26px

sm.description: Inline text container height for sm size - 28px

md.description: Inline text container height for md size - 36px

gap.$comment: Spacing between container elements (leading icon, text, action icons, trailing icon)

default.description: Gap between inline text container elements - 2px

icon.description: Gap between icon and adjacent elements - 10px

3xs.description: Inline text container text typography for 3xs size - 14px regular, 20px line-height
